reasoning: NASA's Artemis III mission, which is the only viable near-term program capable of landing humans on the moon, has been officially delayed to mid-2027. China's crewed lunar plans are aiming for 2030, and no private company possesses the capability to independently and safely land a crew on the moon within the next seven months. A 2025 human moon landing is practically impossible. I assess the probability at the minimum reasonable threshold of 0.02.
